extra.reason: Resolved §3.5 Cursor turn-complete ambiguity: mtime-debounce approach with 3s threshold and last-record role:assistant check. TUI write path source-verified from cursor-agent@2026.02.13-41ac335. Docs updated in both design plan (§3.5) and provider-cli-reference (§5.3 with edge cases, version note, and sample fragment). Live-runtime sanity-check tracked as tmux-untethered-58q (informs, does not block 44v).

Implementation complete. Code review found two minor concurrency issues (non-pure swap! body, finally dissoc race); both fixed in replication.clj. Dynamic-watch-for-new-Cursor-dirs limitation filed as follow-up tmux-untethered-kt6.

Per-session prompt lock removed; session_locked message removed. Compaction-only lock (compaction-locks) retained to guard the one-shot claude --compact CLI path. Kill-window handshake synthesizes aborted turn_complete before compacting so iOS unlocks. AC #1 asserted in test-prompt-never-sends-session-locked. Contract test guards all four removed symbols. 528 tests, 3071 assertions, only the 2 pre-existing baseline failures.

Implemented compaction-lock check in prompt handler; rejects resume prompts during in-progress compaction with error+session_id. Tests in server_test.clj. Follow-ups filed: tmux-untethered-22g (residual TOCTOU), tmux-untethered-3eh (orchestrator path).

Deleted dead code: invoke-provider-async, run-provider-process, active-provider-processes, kill-copilot-session, kill-provider-session, find-newest-copilot-session, get-copilot-sessions-before, invoke-copilot (+ async), invoke-cursor-async, invoke-opencode-async, parse-opencode-ndjson, build-cli-command (multimethod + all dispatches), claude-cli-env-path, kill-claude-session, active-claude-processes. Simplified claude/run-process-with-file-redirection to drop session-id tracking. Removed orphaned tests (~35 in providers_test.clj, 4 in claude_test.clj). Grep for deleted symbols returns zero matches. providers-test + claude-test: 74 tests / 440 assertions / 0 failures. Full suite: 490 tests / 2821 assertions / 2 pre-existing failures unrelated to this change (same failures present in baseline before cleanup). Not committing yet — code review follows.
Fix shipped in 5a2e3d16; verified end-to-end with two old/large sessions
Closed without implementation — can be reopened if work resumes

Replaced build-session-history-response with the unified 5-arg seq-based signature (pruned/caught-up/packed). Added UUID↔seq shim in handle-subscribe to keep the v0.3.0 wire working until tmux-untethered-6a2 reworks the subscribe handler. Preserved per-message middle-truncation in the shim. AC1/AC3/AC5 covered.

Reworked handle-subscribe to consume last_seq (default 0) and reject legacy last_message_id under v0.4.0. Serializes new session_history envelope with first_seq/last_seq/next_seq/is_complete/gap plus per-message seq+session_id. v0.3.0 rollback path preserved behind :message-stream-version flag. Covers AC1 and AC5.

All required unit tests for seq + gap paths already exist from dependency tasks T01/T02/T05/T06. Verified all passing: replication-test 101 tests/602 assertions/0 failures; server-test seq+gap deftests 0 failures.

Routed session_history through handleSessionHistoryPayload; ported auto-speak/unread/priority-queue/notifications into the payload handler; added optimistic-message reconciliation to upsertMessage. Full iOS suite passes.

False positive: load-config defaults to :v0.4.0 when config.edn is missing from classpath (line 100 of server.clj), and coerce-message-stream-version also falls back to default-message-stream-version which is :v0.4.0. The issue claims the default is :v0.3.0, but the code shows the opposite.

False positive: broadcast-session-history! is only called from the watcher when new messages are non-empty. The Claude handler guards at replication.clj line 1811: (when (and (seq broadcast-messages) ...)), and the Copilot handler guards at line 1970: (when (seq new-messages) ...). There is no code path that invokes broadcast-session-history! with an empty collection.

False positive: the test already exists. test-subscribe-rejects-non-integer-last-seq in server_test.clj (line 1939) explicitly tests last_seq=-1 (via the doseq of bad values including "-1") and asserts the invalid_subscribe error code is returned.

False positive: the bySessionAndSeq composite fetch index on (sessionId ASC, seq DESC) in VoiceCode 4.xcdatamodel/contents is the correct and sufficient index for the maxCachedSeq query (predicate: sessionId == X, sort: seq DESC, fetchLimit: 1). CoreData NSFetchIndex entries create actual SQLite B-tree indexes; the composite index covers this exact query pattern efficiently. The indexed=YES attribute flag is an older mechanism and is not needed when a fetch index already covers the column.

False positive: testLightweightMigrationFromV3AddsSeqDefault in ios/VoiceCodeTests/CoreDataTests.swift (line 642) already covers this exactly — migrates from v3 to v4, verifies seq=0 default on legacy rows, verifies rows are not dropped, and verifies the store opens without error.

False positive: ConversationView.onDisappear (line 634-635) calls client.unsubscribe(sessionId:) when the user navigates away from a session, which removes it from activeSubscriptions. The claim that subscriptions are never cleared on session switch is incorrect — the standard back-navigation path triggers onDisappear and unsubscribes. The real TTS stale-snapshot bug is tracked in 7pp/gp5.

False positive: duplicate of 3be. ConversationView.onDisappear (line 634-635) calls client.unsubscribe(sessionId:) when navigating away, removing the session from activeSubscriptions. The claim that activeSubscriptions is never cleared on session switch is incorrect for the standard navigation path.

Added test_concurrent_payloads_for_same_session_produce_one_row_per_seq. Test exposes existing concurrency bug — duplicate rows for overlapping seqs under parallel handleSessionHistoryPayload calls. Marked XCTExpectFailure pending fix in tmux-untethered-prf.

Added test-cleanup-on-failed-channel-send (13 assertions) and the underlying fix in send-to-client! / broadcast-to-all-clients! that invokes unregister-channel! on send failure. Both tasks resolved together since the test requires the fix to pass.

Added test-cleanup-on-failed-channel-send (13 assertions) and the underlying fix in send-to-client! / broadcast-to-all-clients! that invokes unregister-channel! on send failure. Both tasks resolved together since the test requires the fix to pass.
Test added in replication_test.clj covers crash-restart scenario; migrate-session-seqs! now restores file-positions for Claude/Copilot byte-cursor providers.
Test added in replication_test.clj covers crash-restart scenario; migrate-session-seqs! now restores file-positions for Claude/Copilot byte-cursor providers.

Test added for cursor reset on JSONL shrink (4ug); same change fixes the underlying bug (df2) by detecting current-size<tracked-pos and resetting last-pos to 0 with a warning log. Filed tmux-untethered-d9j for the same bug class in parse-copilot-events-incremental.

Test added for cursor reset on JSONL shrink (4ug); same change fixes the underlying bug (df2) by detecting current-size<tracked-pos and resetting last-pos to 0 with a warning log. Filed tmux-untethered-d9j for the same bug class in parse-copilot-events-incremental.

Duplicate of tmux-untethered-7pp (closed). Both describe the same isActiveSession snapshot/race; 7pp's fix (re-check on main thread before voiceManager.speak()) is committed in 4e8d8923 and covers gp5 verbatim.

Backend per-channel subscription gating added to broadcast-session-history!. Push body (session_history / session_updated) now goes only to clients with this session in :subscribed-sessions; recent_sessions still fans out to all non-deleted clients so the Recent panel keeps refreshing for cross-session activity. Closed gp5 as duplicate of (already-closed) 7pp. Filed tmux-untethered-44u for the same bug shape in on-session-created.
Fixed: session_ready handler now gates auto-subscribe on ActiveSessionManager.isActive(). Filed follow-up tmux-untethered-b6v for the same race in turn_complete fallback.

Fixed: subscribe() now defers wire send when isAuthenticated=false, buffering session in activeSubscriptions for reconnect-time restoration. Added isAuthenticated reset on disconnect/socket-failure to keep auth state socket-scoped.

Per-channel :subscribed-sessions gate added to on-session-created session_updated push (mirrors broadcast-session-history! fix from 2yp). Regression test covers three subscription states (target/other/none) and confirms session_created envelope still fans out.

Serialized handleSessionHistoryPayload per sessionId via per-session DispatchQueue + performAndWait so seqHit fetch and insert form a single critical section against the persistent store. Same-session payloads now serialize; cross-session parallelism preserved. Removed XCTExpectFailure from test_concurrent_payloads_for_same_session_produce_one_row_per_seq; all 27 SessionSyncManagerHistoryPayloadTests pass.

Default serverPort flipped to empty; isServerConfigured requires numeric port; VoiceCodeClient.connect() gates on URL parsability + host + port. Tests added (6) and pre-existing tests pass. Two follow-ups filed: tmux-untethered-0lc (macOS configure-server empty state) and tmux-untethered-2xm (surface currentError outside ConversationView).
Fixed in this commit. Backend now sends connected confirmation per STANDARDS.md after authenticate-connect! succeeds.

Implemented in this commit. CDBackendSession.liveFromSeq Int64 cursor captured from first session_history reply's nextSeq, reset on app launch (PersistenceController batch update) and on unsubscribe (SessionSyncManager.clearLiveFromSeq). handleSessionHistoryPayload gates newAssistantTexts on seq >= liveFromSeq, suppressing both initial catch-up and is_complete:false chain replies. Added 4 tests in SmartSpeakingTests covering catch-up suppression, live-push pass-through, chain suppression, and cursor reset.
Cleared on offset-protocol-v0.5.0 branch for clean ready queue; tickets remain on tmux-untethered.

Probe script (scripts/probe-compact-prefix.sh) with --self-test (4/4 pass) + findings doc (docs/probes/2026-05-12-compact-prefix-probe.md) + corroborating production-log audit (0 shrink-recovery firings across 242,121 lines / ~36MB across 6 live worktrees) delivered. Per-session probe rows remain operator-driven and are staged as TBD in the findings doc; a templated follow-up bd-create line for the dead-code deletion sits at the bottom of the doc to fire if the eventual rows resolve to TAIL-APPEND.
CoreData v7 schema + lightweight migration + post-migration backfill landed with full test coverage. AC1-6 satisfied; AC7 (real-v6 TestFlight fixture) deferred pending Travis decision per task notes.

Per-channel :negotiated-protocol-version on connect implemented: server-max cap atom, negotiate-channel-protocol-version helper with §3.2 ladder, channel-protocol helper, hello reply advertises cap, connect reply carries negotiated_protocol_version, subscribe/broadcast dispatch on per-channel state. Startup migration retains global atom (documented). 14 protocol-version tests pass, 19 gate-predicate assertions pass.

Implemented per design §3.5/§3.2: v5 sibling structs (WireMessageV5, SessionHistoryPayloadV5, LenientWireMessageV5) added to MessageStreamTypes.swift, per-channel ProtocolVersion state + reset-on-disconnect + connect-ack/connected consumer + session_history dispatch routing added to VoiceCodeClient.swift. v0.4.0 types untouched. Coverage: 14 V5 codec tests in MessageStreamTypesTests; 10 negotiation/routing tests in new VoiceCodeClientProtocolNegotiationTests. handleSessionHistoryFrame returns @discardableResult Bool for test observability. v5 sync-manager wiring and subscribe wire-shape switch deferred to .12 (post-ack shape guard added).

Implemented line-counts atom, count-complete-lines/populate-line-counts!/ensure-line-count-initialized!/reset-line-count! helpers; wired startup walk into start-replication-system!; 11 new tests covering happy + edge cases (153/153 replication-test suite passing). T5 will wire the watcher call sites.
Implemented parse-jsonl-incremental-with-raw + stamp-offsets sibling functions with 11 deftests / ~43 assertions. Watcher tee wiring lives in T10.
Updated assertion to match current recipe text ('--exclude-type epic' instead of '-t task'). Full backend suite now down to 3 pre-existing flakes.

Added backend/test/voice_code/dual_protocol_test.clj with 5 deftests / 65 assertions covering AC1 (distinct wire shapes per channel from a single watcher tick), AC2 (v0.5.0 fan-out does not invoke assign-seq! — spied via with-redefs counter), AC4 (no :is_complete across full subscribe → push → reconnect cycle), §6 R1 / T8 (VC_OFFSET_PROTOCOL=0 silently downgrades a 0.5.0 client to v0.4.0 wire), and AC5 / §6 R5 (200-line backfill after drop in a single subscribe reply with end_of_file=true). All 5 tests pass; full backend suite at 4 baseline failures (no net new failures).
Deleted the performBackgroundTask pruneOldMessages block (lines 719–732) from loadSessionIfNeeded(). All tests pass.
